title: rubus × indecorus
intro: Rubus × indecorus, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). This plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus × indecorus include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus × indecorus, such as teas and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
